title: schefflera khasiana
intro: Schefflera khasiana, also known as the Himalayan Schefflera, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae, native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Schefflera khasiana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant, including decoctions and infusions, are used in Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
